steps.title: Find the noun phrase required
steps.content: The phrase “one of the ______” calls for a plural noun after the article the. The modifier “hundreds of” also expects a plural noun, so the blank must be a plural noun phrase such as “hundreds of exhibits”.

The correct choice uses the plain plural exhibits with no apostrophe, giving “hundreds of exhibits”. The other three options either misuse an apostrophe or use a singular form, which breaks the plural‑noun requirement. C is correct.
steps.title: Apply the plural‑noun rule
